aboutUsContent: Your ultimate destination for discovering and attending amazing events.

aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.intro: EventApp is an event discovery platform in Latvia that helps you find information about what's happening around you — all in one place. Our goal is to make searching for events fast, simple, and convenient.

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.content: We are a small team in Latvia building a tool for people who want to easily discover interesting events.

whatWeDo.title: What We Do
whatWeDo.content: EventApp aggregates publicly available event information from various sources and presents it in a structured, searchable format.
whatWeDo.subtitle: The platform allows you to:
items: browse events in one place
filter by categories and interests
find the key details about an event
go directly to the original event or ticketing page
whatWeDo.closing: We don't sell tickets and we don't organise events — we help you find them.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content:
Our mission is to become the most convenient event discovery platform in Latvia — helping people more easily find activities that interest them and bring them together.
We believe that access to event information should be simple, free, and open to everyone.

aboutPage.footer: All event information displayed on EventApp is sourced from publicly available third-party websites and is provided for informational purposes only.

helpCenterContent: Find answers to frequently asked questions and get support for using our platform.
contactContent: Have questions or need assistance? Reach out to our support team.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.intro: Have a question, suggestion, or noticed something that doesn't look right? We'd love to hear from you.

email.title: Email
email.content: For general enquiries, questions, or partnership proposals, send us an email:

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.content: Want to share your thoughts about the platform, report an issue, or suggest an improvement? Use our feedback form.

contactPage.footer: We aim to respond to all messages within a few working days. Thank you for helping us improve.

privacyContent: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our services.

section1.title: 1. Introduction
section1.content:
This Privacy Policy explains how personal data is processed when using this event aggregation platform (hereinafter – the Service).
The Service aggregates publicly available information about events from third-party websites and provides links to the original sources. We do not sell tickets and do not organize events.

section2.title: 2. Data Controller
section2.content:
The data controller for the processing of personal data is the operator of the Service.
At this stage, the Service is developed in a pre-incorporation phase. Full legal details will be added once the legal entity is formally established.
For questions or requests related to personal data processing, please contact us using the contact information provided on the Service’s contact page.

subsection1.title: 3.1. Publicly Available Event Data
subsection1.content: The Service aggregates publicly available information about events, including:
items: event name and description
date and time
venue
category
links to the original event or ticketing website
subsection1.footer: This information remains the property of the respective sources and is used for informational purposes only.

subsection2.title: 3.2. User Accounts
subsection2.content: If a user creates an account, the following data may be processed:
items: email address
user-selected name or display name
subsection2.footer: Authentication is provided by a third-party service. Passwords are not stored by the Service.

subsection3.title: 3.3. Local / Anonymous Users
subsection3.content: Certain features of the Service can be used without creating an account. In such cases:
items: an email address is not required
the user may provide any name or identifier
there is no requirement to provide real-world identity information

subsection4.title: 3.4. Saved Events and Plans
items: mark events
save selected events
create plans that combine multiple events
subsection4.footer: Plans are private by default and become accessible to others only if the user intentionally shares them using a private link.

subsection5.title: 3.5. Analytics Data
subsection5.content: With the user’s consent, analytics tools are used within the Service to:
items: analyze page visits
understand general usage trends
determine an approximate location (for example, country or city) based on IP address
subsection5.footer: This data is used exclusively for aggregated statistical purposes and is not used for user profiling or marketing.

section4.title: 4. Cookies
items: essential cookies required for the proper functioning of the Service
analytics cookies, which are used only with the user’s consent
section4.footer:
Users may change or withdraw their cookie consent at any time.
Additional details are available in the Cookie Policy.

section5.title: 5. Purpose of Personal Data Processing
section5.content: Personal data is processed in order to:
items: ensure the operation of the Service
display event-related information
enable users to save events and create plans
provide user authentication
analyze Service usage in aggregated form
section5.footer: Personal data is not sold and is not used for advertising or marketing profiling.

section6.title: 6. Legal Basis
section6.content: Personal data is processed based on:
items: the provision of the Service
the legitimate interests of the Service operator
the user’s consent (for example, for analytics cookies)

section7.title: 7. Data Retention Periods
items: Data related to non-logged-in users is retained for up to 30 days
Account-related data is retained for up to 1 year after user inactivity
Users may request deletion of their data at any time

section8.title: 8. Third-Party Data Sharing
section8.content: Personal data may be shared with:
items: authentication service providers
analytics service providers (with user consent)
hosting and infrastructure service providers
section8.footer: Personal data is not shared with event organizers or ticket sellers, except where the user voluntarily navigates to an external website.

section9.title: 9. User Rights
items: access their personal data
request correction or deletion of data
withdraw previously given consent
object to certain types of data processing
section9.footer: Requests may be submitted using the contact information provided by the Service.

section10.title: 10. Policy Changes
section10.content: This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time. The current version is always available within the Service.

cookiesContent: Learn how we use cookies to improve your experience on our platform.
termsContent: By using EventApp, you agree to these terms and conditions. Please read them carefully before using our platform.

section1.title: 1. General Information
section1.content:
These Terms of Service set out the rules for using this event aggregation platform (hereinafter – the Service).
By using the Service, the user confirms that they have read and agree to these terms.

section2.title: 2. Nature of the Service
items: aggregates publicly available information about events from third-party websites
provides an informational list of events and links to external sources
section2.footer: The Service does not organize events, does not sell tickets, and is not an event organizer or ticket seller. All event information is provided for informational purposes only.

section3.title: 3. Third-Party Content and Links
section3.content: The Service displays information obtained from third-party sources. We are not responsible for:
items: changes to or cancellation of events
accuracy of information in external sources
ticket availability, prices, or purchase terms
section3.footer: When navigating to third-party sites, users are subject to the terms of those sites.

section4.title: 4. User Accounts
section4.content: Some features of the Service may only be available to users with an account. The user is responsible for:
items: the security of their access credentials
activities performed using their account

section5.title: 5. Saved Events and Plans
items: save events
create plans combining multiple events
section5.footer: Plans are private by default. If a user chooses to share a plan, it becomes accessible to those who have the link, and the user is responsible for the shared information. Users are advised not to include sensitive information in shared plans.

section6.title: 6. Acceptable Use
items: using the Service for unlawful purposes
interfering or attempting to interfere with the Service's operation
using automated tools to extract data without permission

section7.title: 7. Service Availability
section7.content: We strive to ensure continuous operation of the Service, but do not guarantee that the Service will always be available without interruption. The Service's functionality may be changed or discontinued at any time.

section8.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
section8.content: To the extent permitted by applicable law:
items: we are not liable for losses arising from event cancellations, changes, or ticket purchases
we do not accept responsibility for third-party services or sites

section9.title: 9. Intellectual Property
section9.content: The structure, design, and content of the Service (excluding third-party content) are protected by intellectual property rights. Reproducing or distributing Service content without prior permission is not permitted.

section10.title: 10. Changes to Terms
section10.content: These Terms of Service may be updated. The current version of the terms is always available in the Service. By continuing to use the Service after changes are published, the user agrees to the updated terms.

section11.title: 11. Contact Information
section11.content: For questions about using the Service, please contact us using the information provided on the Service's contact page.

section1.title: 1. What Are Cookies
section1.content: Cookies are small text files that are stored on a user’s device when visiting a website. They are used to ensure the website functions properly, enhance user experience, and collect statistical information.

section2.title: 2. What Cookies We Use
section2.content: The Service uses the following categories of cookies:

subsection1.title: 2.1. Essential Cookies
subsection1.content: These cookies are necessary for the proper functioning of the Service. They enable, for example:
items: session management
security
basic Service functionality
subsection1.footer: These cookies do not require user consent, as the Service cannot operate correctly without them.

subsection2.title: 2.2. Analytics Cookies
subsection2.content: With the user’s consent, the Service uses analytics cookies to:
items: analyze page visits
understand general Service usage trends
improve the functionality of the Service
subsection2.footer: Analytics cookies are used exclusively for statistical purposes and are not used for user profiling or marketing.

section3.title: 3. Third-Party Cookies
section3.content: The Service may use third-party cookies, such as cookies provided by analytics service providers (for example, Google Analytics), only with the user’s consent.
section3.footer: These third parties may process information in accordance with their own privacy policies.

section4.title: 4. Consent and Withdrawal
section4.content: When first visiting the Service, the user is offered the option to:
items: consent to the use of analytics cookies
decline analytics cookies
section4.footer: The user may change their choice at any time or withdraw previously given consent using the cookie settings or the relevant link available in the Service.

section5.title: 5. Cookie Storage Period
items: only for the duration of the browsing session
for a specific period, depending on their type and purpose
section5.footer: Detailed information about individual cookie storage periods is available in the relevant third-party documentation.

section6.title: 6. Changes to the Cookie Policy
section6.content: This Cookie Policy may be updated from time to time. The current version is always available within the Service.

cookieSettings.title: Your Cookie Settings
cookieSettings.essentialDescription: Required for the Service to function properly. Always active.
cookieSettings.analyticsDescription: Help us understand how the Service is used and improve its functionality.
cookieSettings.noPendingChoice: You haven't made a choice yet.

leaveFeedbackContent: Share your thoughts, report issues, or suggest improvements. We value your feedback!
reportMessagePlaceholder: Describe the issue or share your feedback...
reportSubmittedMessage: Your feedback has been submitted successfully. We appreciate your input!
feedbackFooter: All feedback is anonymous unless you choose to include contact details in your message.
